name: mobius-mcp
description: Give AI coding agents live access to your web app's runtime via MCP.
author: Topman-14

scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/protocol -w packages/capture-core -w apps/mcp-server -w apps/npm-client -w apps/browser-extension
scripts.watch: npm run build -w packages/protocol -w packages/capture-core && concurrently -n packages,extension -c yellow,magenta "tsc -b packages/protocol packages/capture-core --watch --preserveWatchOutput" "npm run watch -w apps/browser-extension"
